description: Product SpecificationMade of 100% polyester, with mesh back padding for enhanced durability, comfort and waterproofingRoomy inner compartment to hold laptopFront pockets to hold all essentialsSeparate bottom zippered compartment to hold footwearNylon bonded thread for long lifeHaul loop for handling easePadded, adjustable shoulder straps that distribute weight evenly and protect the shoulders and back from injuriesErgonomic design to Fit along the torso comfortablyWash careDo not machine washRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
